step_rationale: Phospholipid metabolite; lipid metabolism marker not specific to plaque lipid oxidation or retention.
mechanism: Glycerophosphocholine, a phospholipid breakdown product, reflects systemic lipid turnover and recovery phase metabolism after MI.

references.title: Exploring the mechanism underlying the cardioprotective effect of shexiang baoxin pill on acute myocardial infarction rats by comprehensive metabolomics.
